Pokémon: The First Movie

劇場版ポケットモンスター ミュウツーの逆襲

"The Pokémon match of all time is here."

6.9
1998MOVIEGReleased

Synopsis

Determined to prove its superiority, a bio-engineered Pokémon called Mewtwo lures Ash, Pikachu and others into a Pokemon match like none before.

Tags

clonevillainrevengecloningbased on video gamecreatorsearch for meaningresearcherresearch laboratoryadult as a childanimegenetically modified organismgenetic experimentadventure
